column1: What is the change that is being made?
eSubmitter needs to be updated and automatic updates are not currently available.
Why is the change being requested?
Software is out-of-date for the end-users and no longer compliant with FDA regulations because of it.
When will the change be implemented?
Will there be downtime? If so
column2: which systems and for how long?

column1: During this maintenance the app will be unavailable.
What is the Potential Risk or Business Impact?
Users will be unable to submit files during this upgrade.
Will there be an expense to the client?
Yes
Who will be implementing the change?
Randeer
What are the steps for implementing the change?
Before installation
column2: uninstall any other versions of the eSubmitter software.

column1: use Windows Explorer to navigate to the eSub folder of the installed drive: \\EXEL-FP01.exel.local\eSubmitter\Data\JExpress
Locate and double-click the Uninstall.exe file to launch the uninstallation wizard
If you cannot locate the Uninstall.exe file in your eSubmitter installation directory
be hidden by your system settings. To make hidden files visible:
a. Open File Explorer and navigate to your eSubmitter directory (typically
C:\eSubApps\eSub_v3)
b. Click on the "View" tab in the ribbon menu
c. Check the box for "Hidden items" to display hidden files and folders
d. The Uninstall.exe file should now be visible in the directory
Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the standard uninstallation process
After the uninstaller completes
column2: manually delete the entire eSubApps directory

column1: Navigate to C:\Users\Public
Locate the eSub_Home directory
Important: Rename this directory to eSub_Home_bkup instead of deleting it (This preserves any previously created forms or submissions for potential future
recover)
To install the latest version of the FDA eSubmitter software
column2: navigate to the C:/temp folder and extract the zip containing jinstall.exe

column1: double-click on the jinstall.exe and run the installer https://www.fda.gov/industry/fda-esubmitter/esubmitter-download-and-installation
STS configs are noted here https://stspartner.huducloud.com/kba/78623facb7dd
The three users at Exel will now need to have the app uninstalled and re-installed with the latest version as a local instance: Jeffery Qian
After the change has been made
column2: how will you test that it was successful?

column1: Test by:
Launch app on server and verify that it is the current version
Confirm the same for a user device
What is the rollback plan?
Restore EXEL-FP01 to previous state
